interpretation: fixed_lag0p0 is recommended. Versus v16 fixed lag0.5, stop overshoot p95 changes -0.5px and post-stop jitter p95 changes -0.3813px. Versus lag0, stop p95 changes 0.0px and stop p99 changes 0.0px.
